SECRETARIA DE RELACIONES EXTERIORES

DE LA REPUBLICA DE HONDURAS

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention relating to International Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22

November 1928;

WHEREAS the Convention was amended and supplement by the Protocal of 30

November 1972, the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988;

AND WHEREAS Article 3 of the said Protocol provides that the Protocol shall remain open for accession by Governments Parties to the 1928 Convention after 29 November 1973;

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of Honduras, hereby accedes to the 1928

Convention and the 1972 Protocol, including the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988, and undertakes faithfully to fuffill and carry out all the provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I, MILTON DANILO JIMENEZ PUERTO, Minister of Foreign

Affairs of Honduras, have signed this Instrument of Accession and caused the Seal of the

Minister of Foreign Affairs of Honduras to be hereunto affixed.

Done at Tegucigalpa on the twenty fourth day of October in the year of two thousand and seven

Minister dt Foreign Affairs

SECRETARIA DE RELACIONES EXTERIORES

DE LA REPUBLICA DE HONDURAS

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention relating to International Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22

November 1928;

WHEREAS the Convention was amended and supplement by the Protocol of 30

November 1972, the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988;

AND WHEREAS Artice 3 of the said Protocol provides that the Protocol shall remain open for accession by Governments Parties to the 1928 Convention after 29 November 1973;

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of Honduras, hereby accedes to the 1928

Convention and the 1972 Protocol, including the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988, and undertakes faithfully to fulfill and carry out all the provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I, MILTON DANILO JIMENEZ PUERTO, Minister of Foreign

Affairs of Honduras, have signed this Instrument of Accession and caused the Seal of the

Minister of Foreign Affairs of Honduras to be hereunto affixed.

Done at Tegucigalpa on the twenty fourth day of October in the year of two thousand and

Minister of Foreign Affairs

Ambassade du Honduras 8, чис Crevaux ·5116 Paris

AHF/MAEF N° 029-2007

L'Ambassade de la République du Honduras en France présente ses compliments au

Ministère des Affaires Etrangères et a l'honneur de Lui informer que le Gouvernement du

Honduras adhère à la Convention concernant les expositions internationales, signée à Paris, le 22 novembre 1928, telle que modifiée par le Protocole du 16 novembre 1966, 30 novembre 1972 et amendée le 24 juin 1982 et le 31 mai 1988.

L'Ambassade de la République du Honduras en France saisit cette occasion pour renouveler au Ministère des Affaires Etrangères les assurances de sa haute considération.

ROSEL RENONAL

E) Paris, le 05 novembre 2007

Ministère des Affaires Etrangères

Paris, France
